# PERF-89 negative: configuration is loaded once at package scope
lang: go
file: PERF-089-safe.go
---
package sample

import "github.com/labstack/echo/v4"

type Config struct {
	Token string
}

var sharedConfig = Config{Token: "abc"}

func ConfigMiddleware(next echo.HandlerFunc) echo.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c echo.Context) error {
		_ = sharedConfig.Token
		return next(c)
	}
}
